21.gl: properly, to pry into; by implication, to delve, to explore

22.gl: properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present
22.kj: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have

22.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
22.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

22.gl: a revolution (of time, i.e. an age); also joy
22.kj: [idiom] exceedingly, gladness, [idiom] greatly, joy, rejoice(-ing), sort.
be glad, [idiom] greatly, joy, make mirth, rejoice.

23.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
23.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

23.gl: properly, to entwine as ascreen; by implication, to fence in, cover over, (figuratively) protect
23.kj: cover, defence, defend, hedge in, join together, set, shut up.

23.gl: in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.
23.kj: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.

23.gl: to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively
23.kj: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, [idiom] surely.

23.dv: rarely (shortened) אֱלֹהַּ; probably prolonged (emphatic) from H410 (אֵל);

23.gl: properly, a valiant man or warrior; generally, a person simply

24.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
24.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
24.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

24.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
24.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

24.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
24.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
24.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

24.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
24.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

24.gl: to flow forth (literally or figuratively); by implication, to liquify

25.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
25.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

25.gl: a (sudden) alarm (properly, the object feared, by implication, the feeling)
to be startled (by a sudden alarm); hence, to fear in general
25.kj: be afraid, stand in awe, (be in) fear, make to shake.

25.dv: or אָתָא; a primitive root (collateral to H225 (אוּת) contraction);

26.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
26.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

26.gl: to rest, i.e. settle down; used in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, intransitive, transitive and causative (to dwell, stay, let fall, place, let alone, withdraw, give comfort, etc.)
26.kj: cease, be confederate, lay, let down, (be) quiet, remain, (cause to, be at, give, have, make to) rest, set down. Compare H3241 (יָנִים).
appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still.

26.gl: commotion, restlessness (of a horse), crash (of thunder), disquiet, anger
to be tranquil, i.e. secure or successful
26.kj: be happy, prosper, be in safety.
